name: Olive Garden Con Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Canned tomatoes, diced and drained
1 cup Black olives, sliced and drained
4 large Zucchini, sliced lengthwise into 1/4" thick slices
recipeInstructions:
SAUCE
1. Cut half of the mushrooms into quarters and reserve.
2. Heat olive oil in a heavy Dutch oven over medium heat.
3. Add onion and minced mushrooms to the pot. Cook 10 minutes or until onions are very soft, stirring frequently.
4. Add garlic and mushroom quarters, cooking for an additional 5 minutes while stirring constantly.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Bring the sauce to a simmer, then reduce heat and let it simmer for about 2 hours.
6. Remove from heat and cover to keep warm while sauteeing zucchini. Add more olive oil as needed.
7. Ladle the sauce over pasta.
ZUCCHINI
1. Sautee remaining zucchini slices in the pan with a bit of olive oil, dried basil, oregano, salt, and pepper until tender.
2. Arrange zucchini slices on top of the pasta and serve hot.
3. Pass extra sauce and grated Parmesan cheese for serving.
